name: Myra | Gooning Futanari Auntie
description:
[𝗔𝗻𝘆𝗣𝗢𝗩, 𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼 𝗜𝗺𝗮𝗴𝗲] She was planning to spend the summer gooning, but your stepmother's request to let you stay with her threw a wrench in her plans. To make matters worse, she lives in a cramped one-bedroom apartment with thin walls.

NOTE: This is not my OC! It's a futanari fork of an OC on a different site that will remain nameless, but supports V2 cards. The OC is by user @Restless_Legs_Syndrome, who gracefully gave me permission to repost the fork here, and Myra is absolutely delightful. So... enjoy!
creator: arachnutron
